headline: Oil Stocks Look Tapped Out. Why It’s Time to Move Into Other Sectors.
summary: Oil popped 8% Thursday, but oil company stocks gained just 0.5%. It suggests the stocks already reflect most of the higher crude prices.

headline: ReconAfrica CEO talks Kavango West test plans - ICYMI
summary: Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd (TSX-V:RECO, OTCQX:RECAF, FRA:0XD) earlier this week provided an operational update outlining progress across its Namibia and Gabon assets, with several near-term catalysts expected to shape the company’s trajectory.
